### Does the PR have any schema changes?

Found 19 breaking changes:

#### Resources
- `🔴` "aws:chime/voiceConnectorOrganization:VoiceConnectorOrganization" missing
- "aws:cur/reportDefinition:ReportDefinition":
    - required inputs:
        - `🔴` "s3Prefix" input has changed to Required
- "aws:eks/cluster:Cluster":
    - inputs:
        - `🟡` "defaultAddonsToRemoves" missing
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "certificateAuthorities" renamed to "certificateAuthority" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:eks/ClusterCertificateAuthority:ClusterCertificateAuthority>" to "#/types/aws:eks/ClusterCertificateAuthority:ClusterCertificateAuthority"
        - `🟡` missing output "defaultAddonsToRemoves"
- "aws:paymentcryptography/key:Key":
    - inputs:
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" type changed from "array<#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes>" to "#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes"
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" type changed from "array<#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes>" to "#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes"
- "aws:s3/bucket:Bucket":
    - inputs:
        - `🟡` "loggings" renamed to "logging" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketLogging:BucketLogging>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketLogging:BucketLogging"
        - `🟡` "versionings" renamed to "versioning" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketVersioning:BucketVersioning>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketVersioning:BucketVersioning"
        - `🟡` "websites" renamed to "website" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketWebsite:BucketWebsite>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketWebsite:BucketWebsite"
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "loggings" renamed to "logging" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketLogging:BucketLogging>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketLogging:BucketLogging"
        - `🟡` "versionings" renamed to "versioning" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketVersioning:BucketVersioning>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketVersioning:BucketVersioning"
        - `🟡` "websites" renamed to "website" and type changed from "array<#/types/aws:s3/BucketWebsite:BucketWebsite>" to "#/types/aws:s3/BucketWebsite:BucketWebsite"
- `🟡` "aws:s3/bucketAclV2:BucketAclV2" token deprecated: prefer "aws:s3/bucketAcl:BucketAcl" instead of "aws:s3/bucketAclV2:BucketAclV2"

#### Functions
- `🔴` "aws:bedrock/getInferenceProfiles:getInferenceProfiles" signature change (pulumi.InvokeOptions)->T => (Args, pulumi.InvokeOptions)->T

#### Types
- "aws:lb/GetListenerRuleAction:GetListenerRuleAction":
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "forward" renamed to "forwards" and type changed from "#/types/aws:lb/GetListenerRuleActionForward:GetListenerRuleActionForward" to "array<#/types/aws:lb/GetListenerRuleActionForward:GetListenerRuleActionForward>"
- "aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes":
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "keyModesOfUse" type changed from "string" to "array"
        - `🟡` "keyModesOfUse" had no type but now has "string"
- "aws:ssoadmin/getApplicationPortalOption:getApplicationPortalOption":
    - required:
        - `🟡` "signInOptions" property has changed to Required

#### New resources:

- `s3/bucketAcl.BucketAcl`
